case_title: BACON, FRANK VS SEDGWICK,DETERT,MORAN & ARNOLD et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-28-2002, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAR-25-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPY OF CORRESPONDANCE FROM FRANK BACON TO MR. BURKE RECEIVED AND FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-15-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-28-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF'S FRANK BACON'S TRIAL BRIEF FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BACON, FRANK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SEDGWICK,DETERT,MORAN & ARNOLD BURKE, STEVEN P. ATTY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDANCE FROM SEDGWICK, DETERT, MORAN & ARNOLD RECEIVED AND FILED.
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR APPROVAL. $10 FILING FEE PAID.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BACON, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT SEDGWICK,DETERT,MORAN & ARNOLD BURKE, STEVEN P. ATTY BARCLAY, STEPHANIE N. ATTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COURTESY COPY TO SMALL CLAIMS FROM SEDWICK, DETERT MORAN & ARNOLD TO MR. BACON.
REM: DEFT'S TRIAL BRIEF OF CASE #307766 REC'D IN COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT BARCLAY, STEPHANIE N. ATTY
